title: cyclosorus dentatus var. violascens
intro: Cyclosorus dentatus var. violascens, also known as the black fern, is a variety of fern that is native to certain regions and is characterized by its dark green to purple-brown fronds. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus dentatus var. violascens include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
